title: Tweaked Rods
description: Alters the fishing rod, carrot stick and warped fungus stick to be more consistent in details and style.
body:
With this pack installed, the fishing rod, carrot on a stick and warped fungus on a stick will have their textures altered in a few ways to make them more consistents with each other and elements related to them. 

Staring with the fishing rod, its hook now sports a gray color, its line is black, and its reel has been made slightly darker. These changes are meant to reference its design seen minecraft dungeons, and in the case of the line, make for a closer match to the line that appears when you cast.

Following now to the item sticks, they keep details of the altered fishing rod have the items positions altered to be more in line with the fishing rod, especially the warped fungus stick that due to its vanilla sprite is held one pixel further back than the other rods.

- The current version of the pack is compatible with 1.21.9 to 26.1.
